This is for all of us, we can Trust Him to get us through this. I didn't say it would be easy, but He is with us! Let's pray: Father of all we come before you with concerns and worry on our minds. Some are not sure what to do, some are having anxiety worries, some are afraid, some are in fear. And all these things are normal and okay. BUT GOD! Let us remember to put our FAITH AND TRUST IN YOU! Let us be remember that you PROMISE never to leave us alone. So bring PEACE to those that need it! PEACE to those who are doubting you! PEACE as the time is now that we come through this storm. Replace Milton fears with your MERCY, Grave concerns with your GRACE, FAITH over Fear and PRAYER over Panic. We speak, we believe, and we look to you for direction and all our needs. Thank you for POWER, PROTECTION and your PROMISES. Cover us with your BLOOD. In Jesus Name Amen. PsI: We got this. Pastor Sanders
